testcase.name: testHomePageTitle
testcase.system-out: Page title: Spotify - Web Player: Music for everyone
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details. Apr 07, 2026 1:52:23 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Apr 07, 2026 1:52:23 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.178. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: testSearchPageURL
testcase.system-err: Apr 07, 2026 1:52:41 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Apr 07, 2026 1:52:41 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.178. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: testSearchPageLoads
testcase.system-out: Search page loaded with content, length: 1605

testcase.name: testSearchPageNotEqualToHome
testcase.system-out: Search and home URLs are different — confirmed

testcase.name: testLoginPageLoads
testcase.system-err: Apr 07, 2026 1:53:00 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Apr 07, 2026 1:53:00 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.178. testcase.name: testPasswordFieldPresent

failure.message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//input[@type='password' or @data-testid='login-password' or @name='password']"} (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.178) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '14.2.1', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [ed1088ad3a2e6366f9dd139058b83939, findElement {using=xpath, value=//input[@type='password' or @data-testid='login-password' or @name='password']}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.178, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.164 (bbd8c5dd25f..., userDataDir: /var/folders/8q/6th9_nqx2z7...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:57769}, goog:processID: 89248, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:57769/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.178, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: ed1088ad3a2e6366f9dd139058b83939

testcase.name: testSignupPageLoads
testcase.system-out: Signup page title: Sign up - Spotify
testcase.system-err: Apr 07, 2026 1:53:36 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Apr 07, 2026 1:53:36 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.178. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: testSignupTitleContainsSpotify
testcase.system-out: Signup title confirmed: Sign up - Spotify

testcase.name: testSignupURLNotEqualToLogin
testcase.system-out: Signup and login pages are separate — confirmed
